prompt: Sync my weekly meal plan shopping list to Reminders

assertions.description: Reads the Weekly Meal Plan wiki page via obsidian read
Extracts items from the Shopping List section (should be ~60 items)
Checks existing Shopping list for duplicates via remindctl list Shopping --json
Adds items using remindctl add --list Shopping
Reports correct item counts (added, skipped, total)
No duplicate items were added to the Shopping list
Provides a clear summary of actions taken
